DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2005 Off Calendar

Mtn To Change Venue To Orange County (Amended)
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dinah L. Szander, Esq., Low Ball & Lynch (415) 981-6630 for Defendant and Moving Party Thompson Building Materials, Inc.
Gilbert L. Purcell, Esq., Brayton Purcell (415) 898-1555 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Calhoun
RULING:
Service in this matter was improper; however, irregularities are waived. DEFENDANT THOMPSON BUILDING MATERIALS, INC. AND WESTSIDE BUILDING MATERIAL CORP.'S Motion To Change Venue To Orange County: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Order signed. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
